description: Text can be used to explain something, to be descriptive, to notify, and many other things text can be used for.

fields.Content: What string of text to display
fields.ParseRichText: Whether or not to interpret text formatting
fields.NullContent: What to display if Content is empty
fields.Size: The size to render text at, in display units
fields.HorizontalAlign: How to align the text, horizontally
fields.VerticalAlign: How to align the text, vertically
fields.Color: The color to render the text with
fields.LineHeight: How high each line of text is
fields.MaskPattern: Text entered here will mask each character with this exact string (example for a password field: *)
fields.HorizontalAutoSize: Automatically adjusts the text's size to fit in its horizontal space
fields.VerticalAutoSize: Automatically adjusts the text's size to fit in its vertical space
fields.AutoSizeMin: The minimum size that can be reached via auto-sizing
fields.AutoSizeMax: The maximum size that can be reached via auto-sizing
fields.CaretPosition: The text cursor position on this text
fields.SelectionStart: The starting point for this text cursor
fields.InteractionTarget: Makes this text as the interaction target for this UIX.

usage: Text can be used to explain something, to be descriptive, to notify, and many other things text can be used for. When being effective with text, basic graphic design principles apply even to something simple as text.
